title: Learning-adjusted years of schooling have decreased in around 1/3rd of low or lower-middle-income economies
source: World Bank. 2026. Human Capital Index Plus.
visdescription: The graphic shows a scatterplot of Learning-adjusted years of schooling in 2010 versus 2025
keyFactLabel: low- and lower-middle-income economies, learning-adjusted years of schooling fell between 2010 and 2025.
